general_info.definition: Fluorescent carbon nanoparticles, specifically nitrogen-doped carbon quantum dots, whose enhanced fluorescence may be attributed in part to oxidation of amine precursors during synthesis.

applications.comparative_advantage: Oxidation of amine precursors may contribute significantly to fluorescence enhancement, a mechanism potentially overlooked in previous studies on nitrogen-doped carbon dots

feedback.label: Good
